title: "As Ye See The Day Approaching" Hebrews 10:25

notes.introduction: An exposition of Hebrews 10:25 and Ezekiel 38-39 on the Gog and Magog prophecy in relation to Russia's invasion of Ukraine, examining the players, timing, and divine purpose of the prophecy within the broader context of end-times events and the church's present responsibility.

sections.heading: Hebrews 10:25 and Imminence of the Rapture
Purpose and Limits of Prophetic Study
Timing of the Gog and Magog Invasion
God's Miraculous Intervention and Complete Victory
The Purpose Revealed: God Making Himself Known
The Church's Present Responsibility to Make Christ Known
